headline: Block's Cash App Unveils NFC-Powered Tags for Faster Payments
summary: XYZ launches NFC-enabled Cash App Tags, starting with the Cash App Wand, and lets users tap to pay while blending payments with style.

headline: Why Bitcoin, XRP and Other Cryptos Could Be First Casualties of SpaceX IPO
summary: Bitcoin, XRP, and other cryptocurrencies were falling again early Friday as digital assets got caught up in the tech selloff, compounding a bad week.  Bitcoin  the world’s largest crypto, fell as low as $61,300 before climbing back to $62,500–down 1% over the past 24 hours, according to CoinDesk data.  The digital asset has slumped 14% this week and is now more than 50% down from its record high of $126,272 reached in October last year.

headline: Cash App Turned a TikTok Trend Into a $25 Magic Wand— and It Sold Out
summary: Cash App's $25 NFC Magic Wand sold out after launch. Block plans more tap-to-pay tags for Gen Z consumers this summer.

headline: Amazon unveils latest warehouse robot as tech giants continue AI layoffs
summary: "Our experience of robots is that it's actually driven up employment rather than the reverse," Amazon executive John Boumphrey told CNBC.

headline: Is Block, Inc. Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Block, Inc. has lagged behind the S&P 500 Index over the past year, yet analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock’s growth potential.

headline: A Look At Block’s (XYZ) Valuation As Shares Show Mixed Short And Long Term Returns
summary: Block stock reaction and recent performance snapshot Block (XYZ) has been in focus after recent trading sessions highlighted mixed short term returns, with the stock up about 1.6% over the past day but down roughly 4.7% over the past week. Over the past month, Block is roughly flat, while the past 3 months show a gain of about 6.9%. For readers tracking a longer horizon, the stock's 1 year total return is about 11.5%, against a 3 year total return near 8.9% and a 5 year total return that is...
